name: laws-of-ux
description: UX laws knowledge base and frontend code reviewer. Analyzes HTML/CSS/JS/React/Vue/Svelte code against 30 Laws of UX principles. Provides actionable recommendations for improving user experience. Use when building UI components, reviewing frontend code, or learning UX best practices. v1.4.1: ux-reviewer agent canonical-lint compliant (LR-1..LR-3).
